channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Bouygues Telecom fête ses 30 ans et lance une Bbox fibre + TV à 30 €/mois avec Prime offert 24 mois
item.description: La Bbox Anniversaire 30 ans de Bouygues Telecom est à 30 €/mois avec 1 an d'engagement et de nombreux avantages, notamment sur la télévision.

item.title: Paramount+ Coupon Codes and Deals for June 2026
item.description: Save on streaming with the latest Paramount+ promo codes and deals, including 50% off subscriptions, free trials, and more.

item.title: Home Depot Promo Codes: 50% Off in June 2026
item.description: Save up to 50% today with the latest Home Depot promo codes for appliances, power tools, and more this June.

item.title: Booking.com Promo Codes: 20% Off | June 2026
item.description: Enjoy big savings on your next adventure with our Booking.com promo codes, coupons, and handpicked travel deals.

item.title: 50% Off DoorDash Promo Code | June 2026
item.description: Explore today’s top DoorDash promo codes for $25 off your first order, free delivery, and 50% off DashPass for students and select users.

item.title: Rover Promo Codes and Referral Deals for June 2026
item.description: Score your Rover promo code for 2026.

item.title: Dell Coupon Codes: 20% Off for June 2026
item.description: Get 20% off with verified Dell promo code, plus today’s coupons for up to $600 off laptops, Alienware monitors, and all things tech.

item.title: Lovehoney Coupon Offers: Toys, Lingerie, and Gift Set Discounts
item.description: Save on Lovehoney, including bestselling toys, lingerie, and popular gift sets for date nights, self-care, and couples’ play.

item.title: LG Promo Codes and Coupons for June 2026
item.description: Save 20% with an LG promo code today, plus up to $1,000 off appliances, 40% off bestselling TVs and monitors.

item.title: Priceline Promo Codes & Coupons: 10% Off June
item.description: Unlock massive discounts on Priceline hotels, flights, and rental cars. Find verified Priceline coupon codes and deals for Express Deals, student discounts, and more.

item.title: Litter-Robot Promo Codes and Deals: Up to $150 Off
item.description: Get the latest Litter-Robot Discounts on Litter-Robot self-cleaning litter boxes, accessories, and more.

item.title: Verizon Promo Codes: $200 Verizon Gift Cards | June 2026
item.description: Ready for an upgrade? Apply our latest promotional codes today and choose a select service plan to score a discount with Verizon.

item.title: Hostinger Promo Code: 79% Off for June 2026
item.description: Discover exclusive Hostinger promo codes, discounts, and deals on web hosting, cloud plans, and domain registration. Save big on your next Hostinger purchase today.

item.title: Uplift Promo Codes: $570 Off
item.description: Upgrade your home office with the best Uplift Desk discount codes. Save on standing desks, ergonomic chairs, and accessories during the Spring Setup Sale.

item.title: Huawei Watch Fit 5 : le bracelet connecté au grand écran AMOLED voit son prix chuter à 139,99 € avec un code promo
item.description: La Huawei Watch Fit 5 est le dernier bracelet connecté premium de Huawei, avec son écran AMOLED de 1,92 pouce, sa protection en verre saphir et sa luminosité annoncée à 3 000 cd/m². Elle est disponible à 139,99 euros au lieu de 199,99 euros sur huawei.com grâce à un code promo.

item.title: Hurdle hints and answers for May 27, 2026
item.description: Hints and answers to today's Hurdle all in one place.
